question: How to use the energy saving mode of a coffee machine?
content:
The machine automatically enters Power Off mode after 9 minutes; press either the Espresso or Lungo button to turn it on again.<PIC>
To turn it off before automatic Power Off, press the Espresso and Lungo buttons at the same time.<PIC>
To change the energy-saving setting, start with the machine off and hold the Espresso button for 3 seconds.<PIC>
The Espresso button blinks to show the current setting.<PIC>
Press the Espresso button to cycle the setting: once for Power Off after 9 minutes, once more for Power Off after 30 minutes, and once more to deactivate Power Off.<PIC>
Hold the Lungo button for 3 seconds to exit energy saving mode.<PIC>
ret:
"The machine automatically enters Power Off mode after 9 minutes; press either the Espresso or Lungo button to turn it on again.<PIC>
To turn it off before automatic Power Off, press the Espresso and Lungo buttons at the same time.<PIC>
To change the energy-saving setting, start with the machine off and hold the Espresso button for 3 seconds.<PIC>
The Espresso button blinks to show the current setting.<PIC>
Press the Espresso button to cycle the setting: once for Power Off after 9 minutes, once more for Power Off after 30 minutes, and once more to deactivate Power Off.<PIC>
Hold the Lungo button for 3 seconds to exit energy saving mode.<PIC>",["Manual07_4", "Manual07_5", "Manual07_6", "Manual07_7", "Manual07_8", "Manual07_9"]
notes: Answered from the Nespresso CitiZ D111 energy saving mode section; images are the adjacent button/action illustrations for the same steps.
